creator: peter.larsen@larsendata.dk
text:
After end compiling of nginx, an "nginx -V" does not show modsecurity module

options file:

# Options for nginx-1.14.0_4,2
_OPTIONS_READ=nginx-1.14.0_4,2

built with OpenSSL 1.0.2o  27 Mar 2018

full output of compile session does include modsecurity. Why it's not included in the final binary is for me unknown.
